asia.label: Asia
asia.note: Asia uses the latest official occupation year or checked-in official national extract available per country. China now rebuilds from a newer checked-in official national extract instead of the legacy fallback path.

countries.name: China
countries.sourceLabel: China Labour Statistical Yearbook 2024 + China Population and Employment Statistical Yearbook 2019
countries.tableTitle: Employment total (2023) blended with a checked-in nationwide occupation mix extract
countries.sourceNote: The repo now anchors China to the latest official employment year in the national labour yearbook series, while carrying a versioned nationwide occupation-mix extract in-repo so the site can rebuild deterministically without the legacy fallback dependency.

freshness.summary: 3 live ILOSTAT feeds + 1 checked-in official national extract
